evidence: The inherited W4d ledger closed with dual NO_BLOCKER after round 10 on 5abdad5a. W4f then added the rating-blind WOD path-type freeze bytes and rebuilt the candidate manifest from 93 to 101 rows.

W4f round 1 on 9cc3a788 produced statistics blockers S1-S3. Round 2 remediation 81c684a3 closed the K/F taxonomy and protected-v2 findings but retained the exact-boundary fixture residual; round 3 d1dc2a30 made the 45-degree comparator operand bit-exact, added both side companions, and hardened every other threshold assertion.

The round-3 confirmation returned statistics NO_BLOCKER and execution first-look NO_BLOCKER on the exact 101-row manifest SHA-256 420699d21efa7123dbccf9c75d7401c83c1ef50368f171d350c61aa5264dff6b, with distinct reviewer identities and zero unresolved blockers or majors.
findings.summary: The W4f remediation ledger and terminal dual review close the path-type package for Formal-G1 assembly.

evidence: The execution contract retains the fixed-root rating-blind mapping manifest schema and promotes exactly three WOD mapping hashes through the v1p6 registry, bringing the active materialization binding count to 12 without modifying the protected v2 envelope-builder bytes.

Structural no-geometry scenes terminate at K before lookup; only geometry-available absent lookup rows terminate at F. Missing, malformed, drifted or non-unique mapping bytes remain fail closed with no runtime classification or fallback.
The mapped CSV and manifest remain byte-identical at SHA-256 6e689647a6d8b22cbb8e35c7b9c0889c022798b76a34bec02da2ccb706175078 and 8c48d0eb2f8c530bc0e885b2115136fcf66f69b6f62563de88f31287255040d8.
findings.summary: The registry, materialization and fixed-root mapping controls remain exact and fail closed.

evidence: Current managed pins are launcher SHA-256 89e87fcb721e6c785803e414526ce3b751a2ccc87e3b026b02f8e23e7043f3fe at 122,879 bytes, preflight SHA-256 dce18f8c7f1fbf8f8dee2d4c5b726260a9acba988b5181e4948b991c748af794 at 79,627 bytes, and wrapper SHA-256 a504e4f1593575ca28251fe1b1d4ac7d959ea9257d0c2e4984a30ba42020106e at 8,108 bytes; wrapper, README and execution-contract pins agree.
The terminal candidate manifest is sorted, unique, deterministic at 101 rows and binds the exact execution, science, schema, decision, authority and test bytes under adjudication.
No launcher invocation, HPC operation, rating access or Slurm submission occurred during execution-governance review.
findings.summary: The reviewed pin chain, manifest closure and no-execution boundary are intact.

evidence: Operator preflight job 1922605 failed before cell or ledger work when runtime rejected the checkout-relative blind-anchor input that launcher validation had accepted, exposing a cross-phase authority defect rather than a malformed manifest-only choice.

The adopted root-cause ruling was (b): at commit 218d8bd2 the launcher accepted a managed-checkout receipt, runtime rejected that root, and runtime's exact snapshot-path rule would also reject a stable installed copy; therefore no single path could pass both reviewed phases.

Fix 7ed30065 routes launcher and runtime through the same fixed-path, regular non-symlink, containment, 1,752-byte, SHA-256 80e393f73e353e19da4d280ca946a6e7dcee3197824f723155944829f295496a and receipt-schema checks, while rejecting the checkout path and retaining its repository copy only as review provenance.

The repinned bytes are launcher f7eb384aeb7e16db3ca19fc6acc1590abe966d00ca070621f417c825711f3c19 at 122,573 bytes, preflight 0492a5e5b0782e07d905c26cdd6ee079bd4d33038c03042be7bb11cb84145762 at 81,697 bytes and wrapper 3ad13e1180729a3a72bb0b914fe194ed0b45c3554f095b92c0d5b9e6b7a6119d at 8,108 bytes; terminal W4h review returned dual NO_BLOCKER on the deterministic 101-row manifest SHA-256 4fb4af0cfc452352e08a62ee5c8f14517e077edcaefb27310442967b2591bc68.
findings.summary: One shared installed-receipt policy now closes the launcher/runtime blind-anchor asymmetry fail closed.

evidence: W5a round 1 returned execution-governance NO_BLOCKER on commit 06ffd12d083b7fe0672f02509328de11d87e11d1: the central allowlist contained exactly export, preflight and resource pilot; the pilot contract remained conditional, rating access/join/statistics were forbidden, prerequisite receipt schema IDs were exact, and no pilot resource profile, schema branch, template or entrypoint existed to make the operation executable.

Statistics independently blocked only the three prose ambiguities. The option-(c) remedy amended W5a to 2c8706e8b527d50474abd7b37564b1634398a3b9 and made non-executability explicit while preserving the exact authority JSON, conditional contract, launcher routing, receipt predicates and absent pilot execution surfaces.

Round 2 returned execution-governance NO_BLOCKER and statistics NO_BLOCKER on the exact 102-row review manifest SHA-256 4f24e243575995015aa294abf2dfc2288928ad6066456e9ff9ec87307d37cf07, with zero unresolved blockers or majors and an explicit PI stop after validate-only and before any pilot submission.
findings.summary: The W5a execution boundary remained fail closed through both rounds and terminal dual review is NO_BLOCKER.
